response.justification: The candidate lacks the required 8 years of C++ experience and 5 years of large-scale infrastructure/cloud compute platform design, with most roles centered on TypeScript, Node.js, and web technologies; while they have broad full-stack experience and leadership in mentoring, their technical depth in core required domains like distributed systems, cloud compute, and C++ is insufficient for this role.
strengths: Strong full-stack engineering experience across diverse tech stacks
Proven mentorship and workshop leadership in software practices
Active open-source contributions and infrastructure automation experience
concerns: Only minimal C++ exposure (NI LabWindows) — far below 8-year requirement
No demonstrable experience with cloud compute platforms or distributed systems at scale
Lacks evidence of software architecture leadership in infrastructure domains
